urdu transliteration text: Kahan jaaye aakhir bayabaan har soo
english translation text: Where can she go when there is hostility everywhere

urdu transliteration text: Shikasta hay pehloo akeli hay Zehra
english translation text: Her ribs are broken, Zahra is alone

urdu transliteration text: Kahan jaaye aakhir bayabaan har soo
english translation text: Where can she go when there is hostility everywhere

urdu transliteration text: Shikasta hay pehloo akeli hay Zehra
english translation text: Her ribs are broken, Zahra is alone

urdu transliteration text: Rone pe pehra masayab ka sehra akeli hay Zehra
english translation text: Her mourning is curtailed, a garland of sorrow, Zahra is alone

urdu transliteration text: Dar e Fatema ko jalaya hay tumne
english translation text: You have burned the Fatema’s door

urdu transliteration text: Kiya waada apna bhulaya hay tumne
english translation text: Have you forgotten your covenant

urdu transliteration text: Tamache na maaro musalmano jaao
english translation text: Do not slap her, O Muslims leave (her alone)

urdu transliteration text:
Ali ko bulaao akeli hay Zehra
Call Ali, Zahra is alone
Rone pe pehra masayab ka sehra akeli hay Zehra
english translation text: Her mourning is curtailed, a garland of sorrow, Zahra is alone

urdu transliteration text: Bayaan kis se jaakar karoon dard apna
english translation text: Whom can I confide my pain

urdu transliteration text: hay ghairon ki duniya nahi koi apna
english translation text: It is a world of strangers, there is no support(for us)

urdu transliteration text:
Koi jaake baba se keh do ye jaa kar
Someone go and tell father this
Ke le jaao aa kar akeli hay Zehra
english translation text: Please take me from here, Zahra is alone

urdu transliteration text: Rone pe pehra masayab ka sehra akeli hay Zehra
english translation text: Her mourning is curtailed, a garland of sorrow, Zahra is alone

urdu transliteration text: Aey lakhte jigar aey Hasan ibne Haider
english translation text: O my heart, Hasan son of Haider

urdu transliteration text: Ye nana ke pehlu me sone na dain gar
english translation text: If they do not let you rest beside grandfather

urdu transliteration text:
Tum aa jana pehlu me so jana maa ke
Come and rest beside your mother

Baqi me yahan par akeli hay Zehra
Zahra is alone in Baqi
Rone pe pehra masayab ka sehra akeli hay Zehra
english translation text: Her mourning is curtailed, a garland of sorrow, Zahra is alone

urdu transliteration text: Shahe karbala ne kaha roke maa se
english translation text: The King of Karbala wept and said to his mother

urdu transliteration text: Ye mazloom bete ne mazloom maa se
english translation text: From an oppressed son to an oppressed mother

urdu transliteration text:
Akela hoon main bhi akeli hain Zainab
I am alone as well as Zainab

Akele hain baba akeli hain Zehra
Father is alone, Zahra is alone
Rone pe pehra masayab ka sehra akeli hay Zehra
english translation text: Her mourning is curtailed, a garland of sorrow, Zahra is alone

urdu transliteration text:
Sare marg Akhtar tha Zehra ka nauha
Akhtar, this was Zahra’s lament
Kab aaoge Mehdi kab aaoge beta
english translation text: When will you appear Mahdi? When will you appear, my son

urdu transliteration text: Khuda ke liye ab ye parda hata do
english translation text: Remove this veil, for the sake of God

urdu transliteration text:
Chale aao aao akeli hay Zehra
Please come , come Zahra is alone
Rone pe pehra masayab ka sehra akeli hay Zehra
english translation text: Her mourning is curtailed, a garland of sorrow, Zahra is alone

urdu transliteration text: Shikasta hay pehloo akeli hay Zehra
english translation text: Her ribs are broken, Zahra is alone
